1980 LETTER  #1810a Plate Block of 36 x 15 cents US Postage Stamps
['In 1980 the USPS issued these stamps to commemorate National Letter Writing Week, which was held February 24 through March 1, 1980. It was the first time that a sheet of stamps with three sets of vertical pairs was issued by the United States. Each stamp focuses attention on the importance of letter writing, and some are inscribed with such statements as "Letters Preserving Memories" and "Letters Shape Opinions."']
['Letters Preserving Memories']

These 1.5-inch scale mini figures with wearable ring accessory are a great surprise toy for kids ages 3 years old and up. My Little Pony and all related characters are trademarks of Hasbro."]

UGEARS Archballista and Tower Wooden 3D Puzzle - Mechanical Model for Self Assembly - Laser-Cut DIY Kit
['At Ugears we wanted to transform our passion for history into elegant and complex replicas that will delight you with their accuracy and quality. The details in our models will surprise you, because the technical details are designed to impress everyone, from children who just want to have fun to experienced replica model makers. Why is this product for you? Because you are passionate about the medieval way of warfare, and this model is a unique replica that will amaze you thanks to the carefully crafted parts and a mechanism that allows you to actually fire the ballists. Enjoy a new experience on a Sunday afternoon with the Ugears ballist and tower. Some of the amazing features of this product: 292 components medieval war device replica complex mechanism ballist fires up to 4 bullets in a row; tower size: 15.3 cm x 9.5 cm x 9.6 cm, size of the ballist: 9 cm x 8.1 cm x 14.2 cm.']
['ALL IN THE : Not only do the arch ballista and tower enjoy some wonderful wooden particularities that give a unique charm to the model, but we are sure any history passionate will be amazed by the mechanical accuracy of this set containing a ballista in miniature that can fire wood bolts.', 'A FAMILY : There is no better way to inspire your children to discover the wonders of history than with a DIY project that everybody can participate in. Teach your kids that learning is fun and spend quality time with them while building the arch ballista replica.', 'A  DESIGN: The UGEARS model comes with two parts, the actual arch ballista and the tower, yet we have incorporated many technical surprises like the fact that you can attach the firing module directly to the top of the tower. Don’t also forget about the wooden details and the ivy-cloaked castle tower with a dragon model.', 'NO GLUE : It is true that the 292 pieces are not for a beginner’s level in terms of complexity, but we know that even the experienced model builders hate when creating replicas turns into a mess because of the adhesive. Luckily, our model doesn’t require any glue, making it easier and safer to use.', 'THE PERFECT PRESENT: For any history lover or child passionate about discovering the ancient military techniques, the UGEARS arch ballista and tower model is the ultimate present that will bring a smile on anybody’s face and will be a real lesson of dexterity and engineering for the little ones.']

Walker & Williams Hybrid Hardtop Case and Gig Bag Acoustic Guitar Coal Black
["Walker & Williams is an over 100 year old maker of high end leather luggage that has recently gotten into producing guitar and bass gig bags. Their Hardtop Series falls somewhere between a gig bag and a hard case. It is lightweight, padded and comfortable to carry like a gig bag, but has tough, hard Corplast panels inserted in the top, bottom and sides for really good protection from just about anything short of actually running over it with your band's van. This archival quality corrugated plastic is rigid, chemically stable copolymer of polypropylene and polyethylene that repels moisture. It's the same stuff used to make those mail bins that the US Post Office uses, which as you probably know, are well nigh indestructible. It is also the only soft sided case that any sane person would ever want to use for a Les Paul or other guitars with fragile headstocks, because of the big neck block support and the hard protective panels in the top and bottom."]

RPM Traxxas Slash 4x4 Rear Bumper, Chrome
["Our new rear bumper is modeled after full-sized short course and desert racing trucks for authentic scale realism, utilizing the same great looking rear bumper as that found on the 2wd version of the RPM rear bumper and making the most of an all-new bumper mount design specifically for the 4x4. This new mounting system has the perfect blend of rigidity and flexibility to absorb those nasty rear collisions without transferring huge amounts of impact energy into the more fragile components of the chassis. Additionally, with its twin hinge point mounting system, rear A-arm maintenance is a snap. Simply remove the two bottom-mounted flathead screws and the bumper swivels out of the way for easy access to the rear A-arms! It even allows the rear sway bar to stay in place! We incorporated a thicker skid plate design that does a fantastic job of protecting the rear end and lower mounting screws from harsh conditions such as gravel and asphalt impacts. The RPM lower mount / skid plate is over 35% thicker than the stock version! What more could we do to make these things incredibly realistic? How about mounting points for mud flaps and RPM tail light kits already widely available? That's right; these bumpers come stock with mounting positions for RPM mud flaps (RPM #81012 available separately) and RPM Tail Light Kits (RPM #81030 also available separately). If you haven't seen a Slash with a full set of LED's running at night, you're missing out! RPM rear bumpers for the Traxxas Slash 4x4 are available in three popular color options – black, blue and chrome on gray. RPM rear bumpers are sold with all necessary hardware and complete mounting instructions."]

Snow Machine Cleaner and Winterizer for Artificial Snow Machines | Maintain Reliability and Improve Snow Machine Performance
["Froggy's Snow Machine Winterizer is an easy way to ensure that your snow machine operates at its best from season to season. Often, when snow machines are stored with snow fluid in the lines, the water content will slowly evaporate, leaving behind a residue that can cause clogs or other problems with snow machine pumps. Our Winterizer formula eliminates these problems by cleaning and lubricating fluid lines and pumps. To use this formula, first run hot (not boiling) water through the snow machine for approximately 10 minutes to eliminate all traces of snow fluid. Once this step is complete, run the winterizing solution through the machine for approximately 30 seconds, or until it reaches the front of the machine. You may then clean the outside of the machine and store it with Winterizer in the lines until the next time you use your snow machine. Winterizer is designed to lubricate and protect rubber and plastic components in the snow machine pump to ensure reliability for your next performance."]
['Tired of snow machines that only work for one season? Properly clean and winterize your machine for increased reliability and performance!', "Compatible with Froggy's Fog, Antari, American DJ, MBT and All Other Water-Based Artificial Snow Machines", 'Lubricates and protects sensitive pump components and protects from cold temperatures.', 'Our formula removes deposits in snow machine pumps and fluid lines and removes excessive water content that has the potential to freeze in colder temperatures. Simply flush the system with new snow fluid to begin your next season of snow!', 'Manufactured in the USA and made from Lab Grade DI Water and USP Grade Chemicals for Incredible Purity and Quality']

Also as Invasion From Outer Space is built using the Last Night on Earth game engine the two games are fully compatible. Apollo Bio-Filter Refill Kit (1 Wick 3 Filters)
["With each breath taken on land, your body will naturally release and replenish humidity. The average humidity (moisture) level worldwide is approximately 70%. Compressed air for a tank has a humidity level of less than 0.1%. During a dive, we continue to release humidity. However, each intake of dry air from a tank deprives the lungs and body of moisture replenishment. This unnatural lack of humidity is very hard on your body. The most obvious result of the loss is dry throat and cottonmouth. Apollo's Bio-Filter and A-110 moisture systems will increase tank air humidity 30-70%. Normalizing the humidity level in your air supply will reduce and in most cases eliminate the negative effects of breathing dry air. Keep your filter systems working with this re-fill kit the moisture wick is constructed of high-density foam and the Activated Charcoal Filters also filters out trace particles of dust, rust,and odors."]

Pigtronix Guitar Compression Effects Pedal, Black (PTM)
['Turn Lead to Gold with the Pigtronix Philosopher\'s Tone Micro. Famous for its noiseless clean sustain, the Philosopher\'s Tone stands out as a uniquely powerful guitar effect in the crowded world of compressor pedals. The Philosopher\'s Tone Micro packs all of the optical compression and unrivaled sustain of the original award winning Pigtronix pedal into a micro size chassis that runs on standard 9V external power. In addition to VOLUME and  controls, the Philosopher\'s Tone Micro features a parallel BLEND knob that allows the musician to mix their instrument\'s original tone with the compressed sound effect. This technique restores natural pick-attack and allows more extreme sustain settings to remain musical. The TREBLE control provides up to 6db cut or boost at 2KHz for fine tuning the frequency response of the effect. The Philosopher\'s Tone Micro features True-bypass switching and internal 18V power rails for maximum clean headroom, even when used with hot pickups and line level signals. Practitioners of the mystical and ancient art of alchemy long sought an element called the Philosopher\'s Stone, believing that, if found, it could turn lead into gold and bestow immortality upon the person who wielded it. The Philosopher\'s Tone Micro represents an analog musical equivalent to this mythical substance in the world of guitar. "People have been trying to get clean sustain from a pedal for decades, and the alchemists at Pigtronix seems to have found the secret to make it happen."-Art Thompson, Guitar Player Magazine Pigtronix Philosopher\'s Tone Micro Effects Pedal Features: Noiseless Clean Sustain Blend control for Parallel Compression Treble EQ for Boost or Cut at 2kHz Runs on standard 9V external power Internal 18V power for max headroom True Bypass switching Size = 3.75" x 1.5" x 1.75"']

["This 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle, Reverie, is based on the artwork of famed artist Alphonse Mucha featuring glitter highlights throughout the puzzle. The lithograph Reverie was executed in 1897, originally intended to illustrate the 1898 Champenois company’s calendar. The lithograph was instantly popular and was published in the magazine La Plume with the title Reverie. Alphonse Mucha, was a Czech painter, illustrator, and graphic artist, living in Paris during the Art Nouveau period, best known for his distinctly stylized and decorative theatrical posters Every Buffalo Games jigsaw puzzle is manufactured in the U.S.A. from recycled puzzle board. ['From sturdy allotment sheds to pretty Japanese gardens to catching some much needed Z’s after all the hard work has been done; this colourful jigsaw from Val Goldfinch will get anyone excited about a spot of gardening or puzzling. The beautifully illustrated pieces are designed to fit perfectly with no puzzle ‘dust’, in fact we use the thickest puzzle board on the market. Everyone loves a Gibsons jigsaw, even Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II has been spotted with one. Same great puzzles, kinder to the environment. This jigsaw puzzle is planet-friendly. Not only does the box have a fresh new look, but we’ve used biodegradable clear labels to secure the lid instead of shrink wrap to reduce our plastic waste. There is a HUV coating on the box for extra protection, to ensure your puzzle doesn’t get damaged and the pieces are stored in a plastic bag that can be recycled by some councils. Because the box is slightly smaller than our previous designs, we need less room to transport our products which reduces our carbon footprint and means you can store your puzzles more easily. Behringer XENYX  Premium 12-Input 2/2-Bus Mixer with XENYX Mic Preamps and Compressors, British EQs - Bundle With Gator Padded Nylon Mixer/Equipment Bag, 15' 8mm XLR Microphone Cable
['The XENYX  from Behringer is a 12-channel audio mixer with an integrated USB computer audio interface. It enables you to mix together and shape the sound of multiple audio signals and route the audio to several outputs. Special attention has been paid to the quality of the \'s 4 microphone preamps, "British" style EQ and 4 easy-to-use one knob compressors.The  provides six mono channels and up to four stereo channels, making it ideal for smaller and medium sized audio tasks. There are two aux sends on every channel (which enable you to route individual channels to stage monitors or external effects) and two stereo aux returns. The built-in USB interface allows for a bi-directional transfer of audio to and from your computer. The energyXT2.5 software is compatible with Mac, Windows and even Linux operating systems and includes virtual keyboard instruments and drum machines.The built-in 24-bit dual engine effects processor features 16 presets that include, reverb, chorus, flanger, delay, pitch shifter and multi-effects. You can edit the parameters of every preset and a tap tempo button is included to sync time-based effects. The 4 built-in compressors are designed to simplify the process of controlling dynamics in your mix. With a single knob you can dial in the amount of compression you need for any given sound. Individual compressors are a feature rarely seen in mixing boards in this price range. The 4 XENYX preamps offer 130dB of dynamic range and the 3-band "British" style EQ\'s really allow you to create a fine-tuned mix. The XENYX  is well suited for recording studios, video editing suites, live sound mixing, podcasting and more.']

['From the Manufacturer', "Join Shrek on a swampy adventure. This game cartridge slides right into any Smart Cycle model for extra learning opportunities with fascinating facts, exciting sounds and skill-building games. Three ways to play: drive, learn, or race - with the characters on-screen or against another player. Teaches spelling, numbers, counting, phonics, shape matching, simple fractions, size comparisons, and much more. Drive through the forest and the land of Far, Far Away to learn and play with Shrek, Donkey, Fiona, and their friends. Collect letters to spell Shrek and other character names, as well as some of Shrek’s favorite words. Two learning encounters help children learn number order, size comparisons, and phonics sounds with Shrek. In Ogre Mix-Up, the player needs to help Shrek impress Fiona by organizing her troops, and ogres come in all shapes and sizes. Then, meet a challenge from Puss in Boots in Sounds from the Trees by choosing the correct phonic sound. Next, the two games continue the fun. In Forest Flight, the player needs to help Shrek and Donkey dodge the witches and reach the castle. Then it’s time for Baking with Gingy, so help match the animal cookies to fill Shrek’s order. Finally, after visiting every activity, catch tasty waffles in Donkey’s Treat. This game cartridge is only compatible with the older Plug 'n Play Smart Cycle (not the new 2017 version)."]

EarthQuaker Devices Night Wire Harmonic Tremolo Guitar Effects Pedal
['The Night Wire is a feature-rich harmonic tremolo. What is harmonic tremolo? In short, the signal is split into high pass and low pass filters, then modulated with an LFO that is split 180 degrees. The Night Wire takes the traditional harmonic tremolo a few steps further by allowing the center point of both filters to be adjusted for different tones. The filter frequency has three modes: Manual, LFO and Attack. In Manual mode, the center point can be set to a fixed position with the frequency control. In LFO mode, the filters are continuously swept and the frequency control adjusts the speed. In Attack mode, the filters are dynamically swept according to pick attack and the frequency control acts as a range control, much like a standard envelope filter. The tremolo section has two modes, Manual and Attack. In Manual mode, the speed of the tremolo is governed by where the rate control is set. In Attack mode the speed is controlled by pick attack and the rate controls the sensitivity; the harder you pick, the faster the rate and vice-versa. The tremolo can be subtle and shimmery or full-on throbbing depending on where the depth control is set. With the depth set to zero, the Night Wire will act like a fixed filter, phase shifter or envelope-controlled filter depending on which mode the filter frequency is in. It also features a cut/boost volume control to get your levels just right. Each Night Wire is hand made one at a time in the moonlit village of Akron, Ohio. This device is true bypass and uses relay based “soft touch” switching. Audio will not pass without power.']
['A feature-rich harmonic tremolo that splits a signal into high pass and low pass filters, then modulates it with an LFO that is split 180 degrees', 'Takes the design of traditional harmonic tremolos a few steps further by allowing the center point of both filters to be adjusted for different tones', 'The tremolo can be subtle and shimmery or full-on throbbing depending on where the depth control is set', 'With the depth set to zero, it will act like a fixed filter, phase shifter or envelope-controlled filter depending on which mode the filter frequency is in', 'Features a cut/boost volume control to get your levels just right', 'Made with care by human hands in Akron, Ohio']

JIM DUNLOP Flow Standard 1.35mm Guitar Picks, Black
['First released in 1981, Tortex Picks were originally intended to be a high quality replacement for tortoiseshell. Jim Dunlop’s trail-blazing creation became so much more than that, however, establishing its own identity and becoming the new standard by which all other picks are judged.Building on the precision, consistency, and color-coded gauge system he introduced with Nylon Picks, Jim resolved to create a pick with a bright and snappy attack, superior memory and durability, and an improved grip. He chose Delrin as his base material and then spent more than a year developing a special treatment process to draw out its full potential. This treatment process is what sets Tortex Picks apart from all others, providing their unique grip-enhancing matte surface and aggressive attack. Finally, Jim expanded on his previous picks’ color-coded gauge system to create the bright and timeless palette that has become an industry standard. Because we stick to Jim’s original formula, Tortex Picks remain our bestselling pick line. And we still make them at the Dunlop HQ in Benicia, California.With Tortex, Jim Dunlop launched a revolution, and the world of picks has never been the same. The turtle logo is instantly recognizable, and the vibrant Tortex palette has become a gauging shorthand for guitar players. Go into any music store and ask for Green or Yellow Picks—chances are, you’ll be shown a pack of Tortex .88mm or .73mm Picks. Countless musicians across the world, representing every genre and playing style, have chosen Tortex Picks to help them do what they love.Made in the USA.']
['Tortex flow picks combine the bright snap of Tortex picks with the geometry of flow picks', 'Features a wide angle to focus your attack and a sharp tip for superior precision and articulation', 'Available gauges (mm): . 50, . 60, . 73, . 88, 1. 0, 1. 14, 1. 35 & 1. 5mm', 'Material: Tortex', 'Made in the USA', 'Model Number: 558P1.35']

['Mystic Mounts are a safe haven for your stamps – sturdy “envelopes” that gently surround your stamps. Mounts preserve your stamps and prevent damage from common threats like fingerprints, dust, creases and tears. Mystic Mounts beautify your stamps and give your collection a neat, professional look. Your stamps are held securely in place against a black background – making the colors “pop” and adding definition to the stamp perforations. The correct mount size depends on the height of your stamp. For example, a stamp measuring 36 millimeters in height fits a 36-millimeter mount. (Match the measurements exactly – we’ve added a small extra margin of space.) If your stamp falls between two sizes, select the larger sized mount. For your convenience, you can also measure in inches, round your measurement to the nearest 1/16th of an inch, and match it to the nearest mount size. To insert your stamp in a split-back mount, locate the split on the black background side. Lift a flap and gently slide the stamp in face-down. Then lift the other flap and lay the stamp flat inside. Close both flaps over the back of the stamp. Make sure the stamp fits smoothly inside. Lightly moisten the adhesive on the top of the back of the mount and press it firmly onto your album page. Mystic Mounts are archival-quality, which means they’re made of the same material museums use to protect their philatelic items. Because they’re archival-quality, our mounts are acid free and contain no additives or softening agents. Plus Mystic Mounts don’t shrink or discolor over time – giving you years of service for pennies apiece!']
